---
title: "Paper Title"
# subtitle: "Optional Subtitle"
format: manuscript-typst
author:
  - name: "Author One"
    affiliations:
      - name: "Department, Institution"
    email: "author1@institution.edu"
    orcid: "0000-0000-0000-0000"
  - name: "Author Two"
    affiliations:
      - name: "Department, Institution"
    email: "author2@institution.edu"
    orcid: "0000-0000-0000-0000"
date: "today"
date-format: "MMMM DD, YYYY"
thanks: "Acknowledgments, funding, data availability, and replication notes go here."
abstract: |
  Abstract text goes here. Typically 150–250 words. Summarize the research question,
  approach, and main findings.
keywords: ["keyword one", "keyword two", "keyword three", "keyword four"]
bibliography: references.bib
bibliographystyle: apsa.csl
biblio-title: "References"
# toc: true                   # uncomment to enable table of contents
# section-numbering: "1.1"    # uncomment to number sections
---

# Introduction

Opening paragraph establishing the research question and its significance.

Second paragraph situating the contribution within the existing literature.

Third paragraph previewing the argument, data, and findings.

# Theory and Literature

## Existing Work

Survey of the relevant literature.

## Argument

Statement of the theoretical argument and derivation of testable hypotheses.

*H1:* Hypothesis one.

*H2:* Hypothesis two.

# Research Design and Data

## Data

Description of the data sources, units of analysis, and time period.

## Measures

Description of the dependent variable, key independent variable(s), and controls.

## Method

Description of the estimation strategy and why it is appropriate for the research question.

# Results

Presentation and interpretation of empirical results.

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

# Load packages and data here
# library(tidyverse)

```

# Conclusion

Summary of findings, limitations, and directions for future research.
